name: Category 25: Social Media
description: Social media management and monitoring automations

automations.name: Multi-Platform Post Scheduler
automations.description: Schedules and publishes posts across multiple social platforms

automations.name: Comment Monitoring and Alert
automations.description: Monitors comments and triggers alerts for engagement

automations.name: User-Generated Content Collector
automations.description: Collects and curates user-generated content automatically

automations.name: Hashtag Performance Tracker
automations.description: Tracks performance metrics for branded hashtags

automations.name: Engagement Metric Aggregator
automations.description: Aggregates engagement data from all platforms

automations.name: Social Listening Keyword Monitor
automations.description: Monitors keywords and brand mentions across platforms
